input:
Client: Morgan Stanley, New York, NY
Role: QA Automation Lead
Duration: Mar 2021  Present
Led enterprise-wide QA automation strategy across distributed financial microservices architecture. Key Contributions: Architected unified hybrid automation framework supporting UI, API, and DB validation layers. Directed automation strategy across 15 microservices in cloud-native environment. Implemented Selenium Grid  parallel execution reducing regression runtime by 60. Built API automation suite integrated with Jenkins CI pipelines. Developed BDD automation framework using Cucumber and Gherkin. Designed advanced database reconciliation scripts validating transactional integrity. Containerized automation execution using Docker for CI consistency. Integrated automation reporting dashboards using Allure  Jenkins plugins. Introduced automation governance and code quality standards. Implemented performance validation tests using JMeter for peak traffic simulation. Led 7-member QA automation team and mentored junior engineers. Increased automation coverage from 50 to 85. Reduced production defect leakage by 40. Implemented shift-left testing strategy within sprint lifecycle. Automated security validation for authentication and authorization workflows. Conducted root cause analysis and introduced preventive automation controls. Established quarterly automation framework health audits. Provided executive-level reporting on automation ROI and quality metrics. Defined enterprise-wide automation roadmap aligned with DevOps transformation and cloud modernization initiatives. Collaborated with solution architects and product owners to embed quality gates during system design phase. Implemented service virtualization strategies to enable early API testing before dependent systems were available. Established automated risk-based regression strategy prioritizing high-impact financial workflows. Designed reusable automation accelerators to support onboarding of new microservices. Introduced automation analytics dashboards tracking flaky test trends and stability metrics. Implemented environment provisioning validation to ensure readiness before regression execution. Led cross-functional defect triage meetings to improve issue resolution turnaround time. Standardized automation branching and versioning strategies aligned with Git workflows. Spearheaded automation framework scalability enhancements to support multi-release parallel testing cycles. Environment: Selenium, Cypress, Java, Rest Assured, AWS, Jenkins, SQL Server, Oracle, Docker, Kubernetes
Client: Capital One, Richmond, VA
Role: Senior QA Automation Engineer
Duration: Jan 2018  Feb 2021
Delivered automation solutions for online banking systems and microservices-based transaction platforms. Key Contributions: Designed Selenium  Java automation framework using POM architecture. Built comprehensive API automation suite for Spring Boot microservices. Developed reusable automation utilities and test data management modules. Automated regression suite reducing manual testing effort by 70. Performed backend database validation for DB2 and MongoDB systems. Conducted performance testing using JMeter for transaction-heavy applications. Integrated automation pipelines with GitLab CI  Jenkins. Validated OAuth 2.0 and JWT authentication flows. Implemented cross-browser and cross-environment validation strategy. Migrated 400 manual test cases into automated scripts. Implemented test data masking and anonymization utilities. Introduced headless browser testing for faster CI execution. Enhanced automation stability using retry mechanisms  error categorization. Supported AWS cloud migration testing initiatives. Conducted knowledge-sharing sessions across QA teams. Designed scalable automation framework architecture supporting modular test case development and easier maintenance. Implemented data-driven and keyword-driven testing approaches to improve automation flexibility. Developed API contract testing strategy to validate backward compatibility across microservices. Built reusable API validation libraries for standardized requestresponse verification. Integrated automation reports with Allure and custom dashboards for enhanced visibility. Automated negative, boundary, and edge-case scenarios to improve defect detection in early stages. Collaborated with DevOps teams to enable automated smoke testing for every build deployment. Optimized regression execution time through test suite categorization and parallel execution strategy. Implemented environment-specific configuration management for multi-environment testing (DEV, QA, UAT, PROD). Conducted root cause analysis for flaky tests and introduced stabilization mechanisms. Assisted in defining QA KPIs including automation coverage, pass rate trends, and defect leakage metrics. Participated in architectural discussions to improve system testability and enhance automation readiness. Environment: Selenium, Java, TestNG, Rest Assured, JMeter, GitLab CI, DB2, MongoDB, AWS
Client: TransUnion, Chicago, IL
Role: QA Automation Engineer
Duration: Jun 2014  Dec 2017
Supported credit reporting systems with UI and API automation initiatives. Key Contributions: Developed UI automation scripts for Angular-based credit monitoring platform. Built
REST API validation suites using JUnit and Rest Assured. Integrated automation with Jenkins for nightly regression execution. Performed backend SQL validation for large-scale credit data. Designed cross-browser compatibility testing strategy. Automated regulatory compliance validation scenarios. Participated in integration testing across distributed systems. Stabilized regression suite by improving error handling  logging. Assisted in CI pipeline setup for automated regression testing. Supported UAT cycles and resolved production defects. Implemented structured logging and screenshot capture for better diagnostics. Contributed to early-stage automation framework enhancements script duplication across projects. Implemented data-driven testing approach to validate multiple credit scenarios using external test data sources (ExcelCSVJSON). Created dynamic XPath and CSS locator strategies to improve script stability across UI updates. Automated negative and boundary test scenarios to improve defect detection in early testing phases. Validated batch data processing jobs by performing backend database reconciliation checks. Enhanced Jenkins pipeline by configuring automated email notifications and failure alerts for regression runs. Collaborated closely with developers to resolve flaky test cases and improve application testability. Participated in defect root cause analysis sessions to identify recurring functional gaps and improve automation coverage. Improved automation execution time by optimizing test suite grouping and selective execution strategies. Maintained detailed automation documentation and traceability mapping between test cases and business requirements. Environment: Selenium, Java, JUnit, Jenkins, SQL Server, MongoDB

REST API Automation
 CICD Integration
 Dockerized Test Execution
 Cross-Browser Testing
 Parallel Execution Strategy

JPMorgan Chase  Senior Automation Engineer (2025Present)
Designed hybrid automation framework (POM  Data Driven). Integrated Selenium suite with Jenkins CI pipeline. Automated 85 of regression suite. Implemented parallel execution via Selenium Grid. Reduced regression cycle time by 60. Understood. You want Experience sections only, with different companies, written in a strong enterprise style (Selenium
QA  SDET background). No summary, no skills  only detailed professional experience. Below are multiple enterprise-level experience sections you can plug into any resume.
GOLDMAN SACHS  New York, NY
Senior Automation Engineer
2020-2025
 Designed enterprise Selenium automation framework using Java, TestNG, and Page Object Model (POM). Automated trading and risk management applications used by 5,000 internal users. Implemented parallel execution using Selenium Grid reducing execution time by 55. Integrated UI and API automation suite into Jenkins CICD pipeline. Developed
REST API automation using REST Assured. Built custom reporting using Extent Reports and Allure. Automated 90 regression suite covering high-risk financial workflows. Conducted root cause analysis for production defects. Led automation code reviews and mentoring sessions. Implemented Docker-based headless execution in CI environments. Environment: Selenium, Java, TestNG, Cucumber, REST Assured, Jenkins, Docker, AWS.

Goldman Sachs  Senior Cloud Architect
Apr 2020  Present  Dallas, TX
Project Overview: Modernization of enterprise trading platform to cloud-native AWS infrastructure. Key Responsibilities: Cloud Architecture
 Designed multi-account AWS landing zone. Implemented secure VPC peering and network segmentation. Designed Kubernetes (EKS) clusters for container workloads. Microservices  Containers
 Containerized 25 services using Docker. Implemented auto-scaling and high availability policies. Security  Compliance
 Designed IAM policies following least privilege principles. Implemented encryption using AWS KMS. DevOps  CICD
 Integrated Terraform into automated deployment pipelines. Reduced deployment time by 45. Monitoring  Reliability
 Implemented centralized monitoring with Prometheus  Grafana. Achieved 99.99 uptime SLA. Environment: AWS, Terraform, Kubernetes, Docker, PostgreSQL, Jenkins
